name: ASSIGNEES_BY_PATHWAY
description: Assignees by pathway. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (pw:Pathway {name: $pathway})<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]->(a:Assignee)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count
ORDER BY patent_count DESC, assignee
LIMIT 10

examples: Which companies have entered target pairs involving the Downstream signaling of activated FGFR2 pathway?
Which companies have entered target pairs involving the Aspirin ADME pathway?
Which companies have entered target pairs involving the Activation of Matrix Metalloproteinases pathway?
